ham.subject: AWS Service Health Dashboard – Scheduled Maintenance: us-east-1 (UTC 09:00‑10:00)
ham.body:
Dear CloudOps Team,

We would like to inform you that a scheduled maintenance event will occur in the us‑east‑1 region from 09:00 UTC to 10:00 UTC on Thursday, March 7, 2026. The following services are affected: EC2, RDS, and S3. Please plan your deployments accordingly. No automated fail‑over will be triggered; the services will remain available during the maintenance window.

If you have any questions, contact cloud‑support@aws.example.internal or visit the Service Health Dashboard at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Cloud Operations Team

spam.subject: ⚠️ IRS Notice: Tax Refund Pending – Verify Your Details Now
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Internal Revenue Service has identified an error in your 2025 tax return. Your refund of $4,756.70 is pending due to incomplete verification. Failure to verify within **48 hours** will result in forfeiture of the refund.

To protect your identity, please confirm your personal information immediately by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,
IRS Tax Compliance Division
